definition: parameter, the bits of which indicate the presence of additional information on the current status of a device

definition_ml.en: parameter, the bits of which indicate the presence of additional information on the current status of a device
definition_ml.de: Parameter, dessen Bits die Anwesenheit von zusätzlicher Information zum aktuellen Status eines Geräts angeben

note: The existence of additional diagnosis information is indicated in the DIAGNOSIS parameter.

note_ml.en: The existence of additional diagnosis information is indicated in the DIAGNOSIS parameter.
note_ml.de: Die Existenz von zusätzlicher Diagnoseinformation ist im DIAGNOSIS-Parameter angegeben.
